title: Issue-creation threshold rules + expanded lifecycle states
description: Two linked decisions to cut tracker bloat: (1) rules for when a thought deserves a full issue vs a subtask vs a brainstorm entry (decided); (2) replace the 4-state lifecycle with 4 hardcoded categories / 7 hardcoded statuses — Not Started (open, blocked), In Progress (in-progress), Review (input-needed, review), Closed (done, dropped) — retiring the assignees-derived in-progress signal and unifying state/status naming. Ground truth: notes/01_lifecycle-vocabulary.md. Spans code (frontend + backend), migration, user-guide docs, guide.ts, and the skill plugin.
author: sidhantha
